GetVendors: SELECT v.VendorID, v.VendorCode, v.VendorName, v.VendorGroupCode AS VendorGroupID, v.CompanyName, v.PhoneNo, v.Fax, v.WebSite AS Web, v.AddressLine1, v.AddressLine2, v.City, v.Province, v.Postalcode AS PostalCode, v.CountryID AS Country, v.VendorClassID AS VendorClass, v.VendorCertificate AS VendorCertificates, v.MainContactPersonTitle AS ContactSalutation, v.MainContactPersonName AS ContactPersonName, v.MainContactPersonPosition AS ContactInitials, v.MainContactPersonPhoneNo1 AS ContactPhone1, v.MainContactPersonPhoneNo2 AS ContactPhone2, v.MainContactPersonEmail AS ContactEmail, v.DefaultCurrencyCode AS Currency, v.DefaultPaymentTypeCode AS PaymentTerm, v.PaymentReference, v.RemittanceContactSameasMainContact AS IsSameAsMainContact, v.RemittanceContactPersonTitle AS RemitSalutation, v.RemittanceContactPersonName AS RemitPersonName, v.RemittanceContactPersonPosition AS RemitPosition, v.RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1 AS RemitPhone1, v.RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2 AS RemitPhone2, v.RemittanceContactPersonEmail AS RemitEmail, v.Activeflag AS ActiveFlag, c.CountryName AS CountryNameForList FROM tblVendorDetail v LEFT JOIN tblCountryMaster c ON v.CountryID = c.CountryID
GetVendorGroups: SELECT VendorGroupCode, VendorGroupName FROM tblVendorGroupHeader WHERE ActiveFlag = 1
GetCountries: SELECT CountryID, CountryName FROM tblCountryMaster WHERE ActiveFlag = 1
GetCurrencies: SELECT CurrencyCode, [Description] AS [Description] FROM tblCurrencyMaster WHERE ActiveFlag = 1
GetPaymentTypes: SELECT PaymentTypeCode, PaymentTypeName FROM tblPaymentTypeMaster WHERE ActiveFlag = 1
CreateVendor: INSERT INTO tblVendorDetail (VendorID, VendorCode, VendorName, VendorGroupCode, CompanyName, PhoneNo, Fax, WebSite, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, City, Province, Postalcode, CountryID, VendorClassID, VendorCertificate, MainContactPersonTitle, MainContactPersonName, MainContactPersonPosition, MainContactPersonPhoneNo1, MainContactPersonPhoneNo2, MainContactPersonEmail, DefaultCurrencyCode, DefaultPaymentTypeCode, PaymentReference, RemittanceContactSameasMainContact, RemittanceContactPersonTitle, RemittanceContactPersonName, RemittanceContactPersonPosition, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2, RemittanceContactPersonEmail, Activeflag) VALUES (@VendorID, @VendorCode, @VendorName, @VendorGroupID, @CompanyName, @PhoneNo, @Fax, @Web, @AddressLine1, @AddressLine2, @City, @Province, @PostalCode, @Country, @VendorClass, @VendorCertificates, @ContactSalutation, @ContactPersonName, @ContactInitials, @ContactPhone1, @ContactPhone2, @ContactEmail, @Currency, @PaymentTerm, @PaymentReference, @IsSameAsMainContact, @RemitSalutation, @RemitPersonName, @RemitPosition, @RemitPhone1, @RemitPhone2, @RemitEmail, @ActiveFlag); SELECT 1 AS Success;
UpdateVendor: UPDATE tblVendorDetail SET VendorCode = @VendorCode, VendorName = @VendorName, VendorGroupCode = @VendorGroupID, CompanyName = @CompanyName, PhoneNo = @PhoneNo, Fax = @Fax, WebSite = @Web, AddressLine1 = @AddressLine1, AddressLine2 = @AddressLine2, City = @City, Province = @Province, Postalcode = @PostalCode, CountryID = @Country, VendorClassID = @VendorClass, VendorCertificate = @VendorCertificates, MainContactPersonTitle = @ContactSalutation, MainContactPersonName = @ContactPersonName, MainContactPersonPosition = @ContactInitials, MainContactPersonPhoneNo1 = @ContactPhone1, MainContactPersonPhoneNo2 = @ContactPhone2, MainContactPersonEmail = @ContactEmail, DefaultCurrencyCode = @Currency, DefaultPaymentTypeCode = @PaymentTerm, PaymentReference = @PaymentReference, RemittanceContactSameasMainContact = @IsSameAsMainContact, RemittanceContactPersonTitle = @RemitSalutation, RemittanceContactPersonName = @RemitPersonName, RemittanceContactPersonPosition = @RemitPosition, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1 = @RemitPhone1, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2 = @RemitPhone2, RemittanceContactPersonEmail = @RemitEmail, Activeflag = @ActiveFlag WHERE VendorID = @VendorID; SELECT 1 AS Success;
